text:
Mozbe (モズベ, Mozube) is the Private Guard of the Second Prince Camilla in charge of killing the Tenth Prince Kacho through a Nen curse. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Appearance

Mozbe has short, fair hair and a long face with big ears, thin, long dark eyebrows, an upturned nose with a big tip, and thick lips. He wears the standard uniform of Camilla's private guards. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

After Camilla is confined to a room in the VVIP area, Mozbe and most of her other bodyguards attend a meeting called by Sarahell about Shikaku's suicide. 

Abilities & Powers

As a Provisional Hunter, Mozbe has all the benefits granted by his status as a Hunter. However, these are all temporary, and his Hunter status and license will expire after the voyage to the New Continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 358 

Nen

Mozbe is a Nen user and can cast the same curse as the other Have-Nots in Prince Camilla's employ. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The furigana name of the Have-Nots' curse is derived from Japanese mythology, specifically to Izanami's inability to leave the underworld due to having eaten of its food.
The kanji name of the curse, "Tsujitsuma Awase ni Umareta Bokura", is derived from a song by Amazarashi.
Viz localized the curse's name as "Dust in the Wind: Hell Fruit".
